name: TI-IOC Match - Email Addresses
conditions_text: when the event matches Username contains any of [@ or .com]
when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) OpenCTI - Email Addresses - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY TI-IOC Match - Email Addresses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Username contains any of [@ or .com]
AND when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) OpenCTI - Email Addresses - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: TI-IOC Match - Email addresses
Event description: Detect phishing or spoofing attempts using known malicious sender or recipient email addresses.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
